allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\54712\\Downloads\\Cursor Projects\\aczenin-3\\public\\install.ps1"\); Write-Output "First 4 bytes \(hex\):"; $bytes[0..3] | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ }; Write-Output "Total bytes: $\($bytes.Length\)")

PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\Users\\54712\\Downloads\\Cursor Projects\\aczenin-3\\public\\install.ps1"\); $hasCRLF = $content -match "`r`n"; $hasLFonly = \($content -match "`n"\) -and -not \($content -match "`r`n"\); Write-Output "Has CRLF: $hasCRLF"; Write-Output "Has LF only: $hasLFonly"; Write-Output "---"; $content.Substring\(0,200\) -replace "`r","\\r" -replace "`n","\\n`n")
